title: Crying Scene
content:
If you're going to drop the gauntlet
    at least put on the dress
    of a full warrior    - 
    paint, rouge, lipstick,
    sheer stockings and
    enough powder to smother
    a savage;
    then form a straight line
    and chant the litany
    (wise aboriginals never forgive, you know)
    and a good poundmaker is so adept
    at keeping score.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Crying Scene"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
